title: The Alliance Formation Puzzle in Contests with Capacity-Constraints: A Test using American Football Reception-Coverage Contest Data
author: Justin Ehrlich

steps_raw.instruction: Load football.do in Stata/SE 14.2 or newer. The latest version is located here: https://github.com/Syracuse-University-Sport-Analytics/Alliance-Formation-Puzzle-in-Professional-Football
Change line 2: use"C:\football data.dta", clear to point to the locatin that you saved football.do
